title: RB26DETT Engine
description: The RB26DETT is a 2.6L twin-turbo inline-six engine built by Nissan for the Skyline GT-R.

title: 2JZ-GTE Engine
description: The 2JZ-GTE is a 3.0L twin-turbo inline-six engine built by Toyota for the Supra.

title: 13b - REW Engine
description: The 13B-REW is a 1.3L twin-turbo rotary engine built by Mazda for the RX-7.

title: VR38DETT Engine
description: The VR38DETT is a 3.8L twin-turbo V6 engine built by Nissan for the GT-R.
